source.caveat: Rare slot demand and build usage are extracted from poe.ninja. Rare mod signatures and craft routes are rule-based recommendations, not direct item-mod exports.

modSignature: Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix
craftPlan: Omen refine if two key mods land
riskFlags: 供給が多く価格競争になりやすい
耐性だけの品は差別化しにくい

trade.query:
PoE2 trade manual tune memo
用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Accessory / Ring
Base/type hint: Ring
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Life 50+
- Mana 50+
- Total elemental resistance 60+
- Attack speed 8%+

[Tighten first]
- +# to maximum Life or Mana (main filter)
- +#% to Elemental Resistances (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Life/Mana/ES: one strong prefix
- Total useful resists: 70%+ target
- Damage/speed suffix: one build-facing suffix

[Optional upside]
- Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

required.label: +# to maximum Life or Mana
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: +#% to Elemental Resistances
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Life/Mana/ES
minimums.why: rings without a core resource roll are hard to price up

minimums.label: Total useful resists
minimums.why: resist rings are common, total value needs to be obvious

minimums.label: Damage/speed suffix
minimums.why: separates the item from generic fixer rings

avoid: resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

trade.query:

League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Accessory / Amulet
Base/type hint: Amulet
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- +1 attack skills
- Life 50+
- Mana 50+
- Critical damage 20%+
- Dexterity 30+

[Tighten first]
- +1 to Level of all Attack Skills (main filter)
- +# to Dexterity or Strength (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- +Level: +1 minimum, +2 watchlist
- Attributes or resource: one strong support roll
- Damage multiplier: high tier if present

[Optional upside]
- +#% to Global Critical Multiplier (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- items missing the premium first filter

required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: +#% to Global Critical Multiplier
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: +Level
minimums.why: most buyers start with a level filter

minimums.label: Attributes or resource
minimums.why: makes attribute-starved builds easier to fit

avoid: items missing the premium first filter

League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Armour / Boots
Base/type hint: Boots
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Movement speed 25%+
- Life 50+
- Total elemental resistance 50+

[Tighten first]
- +#% increased Movement Speed (main filter)
- +# to maximum Life (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Movement Speed: 25%+ preferred
- Life or ES: mid/high tier
- Total useful resists: 60%+ if no premium mod

[Optional upside]
- +#% to Elemental Resistances (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

minimums.why: keeps the listing from blending into bulk supply

League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Jewel
Base/type hint: Jewel
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 1

[Trade filters]
- Critical damage 15%+
- Attack speed 5%+
- Cast speed 5%+

[Tighten first]
- build-specific damage mod (main filter)
- defensive or attribute mod (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Build-specific damage: two relevant lines
- Defense or attribute: one useful support line
- Corruption/high tier: manual watch

[Optional upside]
- corrupted or high-tier roll watch (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- generic damage jewels with no exact build fit

required.label: build-specific damage mod
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: defensive or attribute mod
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: corrupted or high-tier roll watch
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Build-specific damage
minimums.why: jewels are bought by exact build fit

avoid: generic damage jewels with no exact build fit

Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Armour / Helmet
Base/type hint: Helmet
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Life 50+
- Energy Shield 50+

- +# to maximum Life or Energy Shield (main filter)
- +#% to Elemental Resistances (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]

- Utility suffix: reservation, attribute, or skill utility

[Optional upside]
- reservation, attribute, or skill utility suffix (nice to have)

- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Weapon
Base/type hint: Bow
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Life 50+
- Total elemental resistance 50+
- Attack speed 8%+
- Cast speed 8%+

[Tighten first]
- primary damage prefix (main filter)
- life or defensive prefix (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Primary damage/defense roll: high enough to notice
- Life/resource or resistance: one defensive anchor
- Build-facing suffix: one useful suffix

[Optional upside]
- resistance or speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares

required.label: primary damage prefix
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: life or defensive prefix
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: resistance or speed suffix
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

trade.query:
PoE2 trade manual tune memo
用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Weapon
Base/type hint: Quarterstaff
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Physical damage 80%+
- Local attack speed 10%+
- Accuracy 100+
- Critical chance 40%+

[Tighten first]
- +#% increased Physical Damage (main filter)
- +#% to Attack Speed (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Physical or elemental DPS: clear high roll
- Attack speed: 10%+ target
- Accuracy or crit: one useful suffix

[Optional upside]
- Adds # to # Elemental Damage (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- items missing the premium first filter

required.label: +#% increased Physical Damage
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: +#% to Attack Speed
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: Adds # to # Elemental Damage
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Accuracy or crit
minimums.why: helps justify price above essence failures

avoid: items missing the premium first filter

trade.query:
PoE2 trade manual tune memo
用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Weapon
Base/type hint: Wand
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- +1 spell skills
- Spell damage 70%+
- Cast speed 8%+
- Mana 50+

[Tighten first]
- +2 to Level of all Spell Skills (main filter)
- +#% increased Spell Damage (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- +Spell level: +2 target, +1 budget
- Spell damage: 80%+ target
- Cast speed: 10%+ if available

[Optional upside]
- +#% to Cast Speed (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- items missing the premium first filter

required.label: +2 to Level of all Spell Skills
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: +#% increased Spell Damage
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: +#% to Cast Speed
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: +Spell level
minimums.why: caster weapons are usually filtered by gem level first

avoid: items missing the premium first filter

[Manual target rolls]
- Primary damage/defense roll: high enough to notice
- Life/resource or resistance: one defensive anchor
- Build-facing suffix: one useful suffix

[Optional upside]
- resistance or speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares

required.label: primary damage prefix
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: life or defensive prefix
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: resistance or speed suffix
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

profile.copyText:
PoE2 trade manual tune memo
用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Off-hand
Base/type hint: Buckler
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Life 50+
- Total elemental resistance 50+
- Attack speed 8%+
- Cast speed 8%+

[Tighten first]
- primary damage prefix (main filter)
- life or defensive prefix (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Primary damage/defense roll: high enough to notice
- Life/resource or resistance: one defensive anchor
- Build-facing suffix: one useful suffix

[Optional upside]
- resistance or speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
